# Velixa Capital

> Authorized channel partner with India's leading banks & NBFCs. Loans, tax, accounting, and property consulting under one roof. Diagnosis-first approach — we review your file before submitting, not a lead-blast aggregator.

Velixa Capital is an Indian financial services consultancy that helps business owners, professionals, and property investors get loans approved. Unlike typical aggregators that blast files to 10+ portals (causing multiple CIBIL hits and automated rejections), Velixa diagnoses eligibility first, structures the credit/banking/tax profile, then matches the file to 1-2 right-fit lenders.

## Core Services

- [Business Loans](/loans/business-loan): Collateral-free MSME funding up to ₹1 Cr, rates from 8%* p.a.
- [Personal Loans](/loans/personal-loan): Unsecured funds, rates from 9.9%* p.a., disbursal in 24-72 hours
- [Home Loans](/loans/home-loan): Rates from 8.35%* p.a., tenure up to 30 years
- [Loan Against Property](/loans/loan-against-property): Unlock property value, rates from 9.5%* p.a.
- [Working Capital Finance](/working-capital-finance): OD/CC limits for smooth operations
- [CGTMSE Funding](/cgtmse-funding): Collateral-free MSME funding up to ₹5 Cr
- [Credit Cards](/credit-cards): Cashback, travel, fuel, premium cards
- [GST & ITR Filing](/tax-accounting): Registration, returns, bookkeeping — ITR from ₹499
- [Property Advisory](/property-consulting): Transaction assistance, lease documentation

## Free Tools

- [EMI Calculator](/loans): Calculate EMI for 14 loan types with live sliders
- [Funding Readiness Assessment](/funding-readiness-assessment): Score your business against 6 pillars
- [Eligibility Check](/eligibility): Free, 60-second eligibility review
- [Business Funding Scorecard](/business-funding-scorecard): See where your file stands

- [Business Loan vs LAP](/compare/business-loan-vs-lap)
- [GST Loan vs Traditional Loan](/compare/gst-loan-vs-traditional-loan)
- [Private vs Public Sector Bank Loans](/compare/private-vs-public-sector-bank-loans)

## Government Schemes

- [PMEGP](/loans/govt-schemes/pmegp): Up to ₹50L manufacturing / ₹20L service
- [MUDRA Loan](/loans/govt-schemes/mudra-loan): Up to ₹10 lakh
- [Stand-Up India](/loans/govt-schemes/stand-up-india): ₹10L to ₹1 Cr for SC/ST/Women
- [PM SVANidhi](/loans/govt-schemes/pm-svanidhi): ₹10K-₹50K for street vendors
- [CGTMSE](/loans/govt-schemes/cgtmse): Up to ₹5 Cr collateral-free for MSEs

## Key Differentiators

1. **Diagnosis-first**: We review your file BEFORE submitting — not after a rejection
2. **No blind portal submissions**: We don't blast your file to 10+ lenders
3. **No unnecessary CIBIL enquiries**: CIBIL pull only when we agree to submit to a specific lender
4. **One accountable team**: Loans, tax, GST, accounting, property — under one roof
5. **Strict data privacy**: All PII is AES-256-GCM encrypted before storage

## Contact

- Phone: +91 95829 14054
- Email: info@velixacapital.in
- Website: https://www.velixacapital.com
- Tagline: Trust. Growth. Stability. Prosperity.

## Important

Velixa Capital is NOT a lender. We are an authorized channel partner with RBI-registered banks and NBFCs. Loan approvals, interest rates, credit limits, and service outcomes are subject to the policies of the respective institutions. All rates are indicative — final rates are at the lender's discretion.
